attacking_style: Early attacks deep into climbs despite time-trialist profile, attempting to build gaps before pure climbers respond. Willing to go long from distance on mountain stages.
team_tactics: Insufficient data - only one race observation available showing individual effort without clear team setup context.
terrain_preference: Time trials likely strongest suit given profile description. Exposed on sustained climbs against specialized climbers despite willingness to attack.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain early climbing attacks against pure climbers; 26-second advantage evaporated when proper climbers engaged. Physiological limitations on prolonged mountain efforts.
key_patterns: Attacks early and deep into climbs rather than waiting for finale.
Time-trial engine insufficient to hold off specialized climbers on mountain stages.
Willing to take ambitious long-range attacks despite profile mismatch with terrain.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows tactical ambition but strategic mismatch, insufficient data for trajectory assessment
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
